---
title: "Immune Cell Lineage Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```

## Load integrated Seurat object

```{r load-object}
obj <- readRDS("lungQuery_After_AZ_Normalized.rds")
```

## Subset immune cells

```{r subset-immune}
immune <- subset(obj, subset = Level1 == "Immune")

immune
```

## Immune UMAP by finest-level subtype

```{r immune-umap-finest, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
DimPlot(
  immune,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "new_celltype",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE
) +
  ggtitle("Immune Cell Lineage Subtypes")
```

## Immune UMAP by developmental / disease group

```{r immune-umap-group, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
DimPlot(
  immune,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "Donor_Group"
) +
  ggtitle("Immune Cells Across Developmental and Disease Groups")
```

## Canonical immune lineage markers

```{r immune-featureplots, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
FeaturePlot(
  immune,
  features = c(
    "PTPRC", "CD3D", "CD3E", "CD4",
    "CD8A", "MS4A1", "CD68", "LYZ",
    "LST1", "FCGR3A", "NKG7", "GNLY"
  ),
  reduction = "umap",
  ncol = 4
)
```

## Dot plot of immune markers by finest-level subtype

```{r immune-dotplot, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
immune_markers <- c(
  "PTPRC",
  "CD3D", "CD3E", "CD4", "CD8A",
  "MS4A1", "CD79A",
  "CD68", "LYZ", "LST1", "FCGR3A",
  "NKG7", "GNLY",
  "MKI67"
)

DotPlot(
  immune,
  features = immune_markers,
  group.by = "new_celltype"
) +
  RotatedAxis() +
  ggtitle("Immune Lineage Marker Expression by Finest-Level Cell Type")
```

## Immune subtype cell counts

```{r immune-counts}
immune_counts <- immune@meta.data %>%
  count(Donor_Group, new_celltype) %>%
  arrange(Donor_Group, desc(n))

immune_counts
```

## Immune subtype proportions by group

```{r immune-proportions}
immune_prop <- immune@meta.data %>%
  count(Donor_Group, new_celltype) %>%
  group_by(Donor_Group) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

immune_prop
```

```{r immune-proportion-plot, fig.width=11, fig.height=6}
ggplot(
  immune_prop,
  aes(x = Donor_Group, y = Proportion, fill = new_celltype)
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  ylab("Proportion of immune cells") +
  xlab("Developmental / disease group") +
  ggtitle("Immune Cell Lineage Composition Across Groups")
```

## Optional: save immune lineage outputs

```{r save-outputs}
write.csv(
  immune@meta.data,
  "Immune_Cell_Metadata_Finest_Level.csv",
  row.names = TRUE
)

write.csv(
  immune_counts,
  "Immune_Cell_Counts_Finest_Level.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  immune_prop,
  "Immune_Cell_Proportions_Finest_Level.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

## Session information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
